---
title: "check_kalshi_auth"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `check_kalshi_auth()`

Validate Kalshi Authentication Setup

## Usage

```r
check_kalshi_auth()
```

## Value

Returns the key path if found; otherwise, throws an error.

## Description

Internal check to ensure the user has run 'kalshi_auth_setup()'
before attempting an authenticated API call.
